news.t: Top 3 Commodity ETFs to Hedge Inflation

overview.description: The iShares Bloomberg Roll Select Commodity Strategy ETF (CMDY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg Roll Select Commodity index. The fund tracks an index that holds futures contracts on a roll-cost optimized broad market commodity index. CMDY was launched on Apr 3, 2018 and is issued by BlackRock.
